svg.text: 1. Every input feature x_i connects to every neuron in Hidden Layer 1 → learned weights W₁ combine them
2. Each hidden-1 activation feeds into every neuron of Hidden Layer 2 → the 64-dim compressed "risk representation"
3. The 64-dim embedding connects to a single output neuron → logit z → sigmoid → risk probability ŷ
Every node in layer L is wired to every node
in layer L+1. No shortcuts, no skip links.
ReLU(x) = max(0, x) · σ(z) = 1/(1+e⁻ᶻ) · Loss: BCEWithLogits · Optimizer: Adam (lr=0.001, weight_decay=1e-5)
